SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") is entered into on this 15th day of October 2023 by and between:

1. Dr. Alan Tan, NRIC No. S2345678H, residing at 123 Orchard Lane, Singapore 123456, and reachable at +65 9123 4567 or alan.tan@example.sg (the "Seller"); and

2. Stellar Ventures Pte. Ltd., UEN 200123456Z, with registered office at 456 Raffles Place, Singapore 789012, contactable via info@stellarventures.sg (the "Buyer").

WHEREAS, the Seller agrees to sell and the Buyer agrees to purchase 5,000 shares of Stellar Innovations Pte. Ltd. for a total consideration of SGD 500,000 under the terms set forth in this SPA.

The parties acknowledge that the project plan is not a deliverable within the current scope of this SPA, and the project status discussed herein does not affect the obligations.

For access to the SPA documentation, please visit https://example.sg/user/S2345678H.
